# Calmify - Technical Deep Dive Report

**Generated by**: Jarvis AI Analysis System
**Date**: 2025-01-19
**Project Version**: 1.0.0
**Analysis Scope**: Complete codebase architecture, tech stack, cloud infrastructure, and development workflows

---

## Executive Summary

Calmify è un'applicazione Android nativa enterprise-grade per mental health e wellness. Il progetto rappresenta un esempio eccellente di architettura moderna Android utilizzando il **2025 Tech Stack** con particolare focus su:

- **Clean Architecture multi-modulo** per scalabilità e manutenibilità
- **Firebase Firestore** come backend cloud (migrazione da MongoDB Realm completata)
- **Gemini AI integration** per chat intelligenti context-aware
- **Voice synthesis avanzata** con Gemini 2.5 TTS e Live API
- **Material3 Design System** con theming professionale

---

## 1. Architettura del Progetto

### 1.1 Pattern Architetturale: Multi-Module Clean Architecture

Il progetto è strutturato in **7 moduli principali**, ciascuno con responsabilità ben definite:

```
CalmifyApp/
├── app/                    # Application entry point
├── buildSrc/               # Centralized build configuration
├── core/
│   ├── ui/                # Shared UI components, theming
│   └── util/              # Shared utilities, models
├── data/
│   └── mongo/             # Data layer (repositories, database)
└── features/
    ├── auth/              # Authentication
    ├── home/              # Home feed
    ├── write/             # Diary writing
    ├── chat/              # Chat AI & Live conversation
    └── history/           # History view
```

### 1.2 Dependency Flow

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              app module                     │
│  (MainActivity, Navigation, DI Setup)       │
└──────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
               │
     ┌─────────┴─────────┐
     │                   │
┌────▼─────┐      ┌─────▼──────┐
│ features │      │    data    │
│ modules  │      │   (mongo)  │
└────┬─────┘      └─────┬──────┘
     │                  │
     └────────┬─────────┘
              │
         ┌────▼────┐
         │  core   │
         │ (ui/util)│
         └─────────┘
```

**Key Principles**:
- Features non si conoscono tra loro (no cross-feature dependencies)
- Tutti dipendono da `core/ui` e `core/util`
- Data layer è condiviso via Hilt dependency injection
- Navigation è centralizzata in `app` module

### 1.3 Layer Separation

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│   UI Layer (Compose Screens)        │  ← State management con StateFlow
├──────────────────────────────────────┤
│   ViewModel Layer                    │  ← Business logic, state transformation
├──────────────────────────────────────┤
│   Repository Layer                   │  ← Data source abstraction
├──────────────────────────────────────┤
│   Data Source (Firestore/Room)       │  ← Actual data operations
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Flow Pattern**:
1. **UI** osserva `StateFlow` dal ViewModel
2. **ViewModel** chiama Repository methods
3. **Repository** ritorna `Flow<RequestState<T>>`
4. **Data Source** gestisce operazioni async (Firestore, Room)

---

## 2. Tech Stack Dettagliato

### 2.1 Frontend (UI/UX)

| Componente | Tecnologia | Versione | Note |
|-----------|-----------|---------|------|
| **UI Framework** | Jetpack Compose | BOM 2025.01.00 | Dichiarativo, reactive |
| **Design System** | Material3 | Latest | Custom theme con light/dark mode |
| **Navigation** | Navigation Compose | 2.8.5 | Type-safe routes |
| **Image Loading** | Coil | 3.3.0 | Async image loading con caching |
| **Markdown** | RichText Compose | 0.20.0 | Per chat messages formatting |
| **Date/Time Picker** | MaxKeppeler Sheets | 1.0.2 | Material3 dialogs |
| **Permissions** | Accompanist | 0.36.0 | Permission handling |

**UI Architecture**:
- **Single Activity** con multiple screens tramite Navigation Compose
- **BottomAppBar** con `exitAlwaysScrollBehavior` per UX avanzata
- **ModalNavigationDrawer** globale per account management
- **Custom Animations** per transizioni smooth tra screens

### 2.2 Backend & Cloud (Firebase)

| Servizio | Utilizzo | Configurazione |
|---------|---------|---------------|
| **Firebase Auth** | Google Sign-In | One-Tap Compose integration |
| **Firestore** | Cloud database | Database `calmify-native` (Native Mode) |
| **Firebase Storage** | Image uploads | Organized per userId/sessionId |
| **Firebase AI** | Gemini integration | gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.5-tts |
| **Firebase Analytics** | Usage tracking | Event logging |
| **Firebase Functions** | Backend logic | Cloud Functions (serverless) |

**Firestore Architecture**:
```
calmify-native (Database)
└── diaries (Collection)
    └── {diaryId} (Document)
        ├── _id: String
        ├── ownerId: String (indexed)
        ├── title: String
        ├── description: String
        ├── mood: String
        ├── images: Array<String>
        └── date: Timestamp (indexed)
```

**Security Rules**:
```javascript
match /diaries/{diaryId} {
  allow read, write: if request.auth != null
                     && resource.data.ownerId == request.auth.uid;
}
```

**Cache Configuration**:
- Persistent cache: 100MB limit
- Memory cache con garbage collection automatica
- Offline-first strategy

### 2.3 Database Locale (Room)

**Room 2.7.2** gestisce dati locali per:
- Chat sessions e messages (non sincronizzati su cloud)
- Image upload queue (retry mechanism)
- Image delete queue (cleanup)

**Entities**:

```kotlin
@Entity(tableName = "chat_sessions")
data class ChatSessionEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val title: String,
    val createdAt: Long,
    val lastMessageAt: Long,
    val aiModel: String,
    val messageCount: Int,
    val ownerId: String
)

@Entity(tableName = "chat_messages")
data class ChatMessageEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val sessionId: String,
    val content: String,
    val isUser: Boolean,
    val timestamp: Long,
    val status: String,
    val error: String?
)
```

**DAOs con Flow**:
```kotlin
@Dao
interface ChatSessionDao {
    @Query("SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE ownerId = :userId ORDER BY lastMessageAt DESC")
    fun getAllSessions(userId: String): Flow<List<ChatSessionEntity>>
}
```

**Type Converters**:
- `Instant` ↔ `Long` (epoch millis)
- `List<String>` ↔ `String` (JSON serialization con Gson)
- `Date` ↔ `Long`

### 2.4 AI & Voice System

#### Text Chat (Gemini 2.0 Flash)

**Implementation**: Firebase AI SDK (NO Ktor dependencies)

```kotlin
val generativeModel = Firebase.ai.generativeModel(
    modelName = "gemini-2.0-flash",
    generationConfig = generationConfig {
        temperature = 0.8f
        topK = 1
        topP = 0.95f
        maxOutputTokens = 4096
    }
)
```

**Context Building**:
1. **Conversation History**: Ultimi 5 messaggi
2. **Diary Context**: 5 diary più recenti (max 30 giorni)
3. **User Profile Analysis**:
   - Dominant mood
   - Recurring themes
   - Writing style
   - Preferred writing time

**Personality Prompt**:
```
Sei Lifo, l'amico AI di Calmify.

REGOLE FONDAMENTALI:
- MASSIMO 1-2 FRASI BREVI
- Parla come un amico al bar
- Usa espressioni naturali
- Emoji con parsimonia (max 1 per messaggio)
```

**Response Streaming**:
```kotlin
generativeModel.generateContentStream(prompt)
    .collect { chunk ->
        chunk.text?.let { text ->
            responseBuffer.append(text)
            emit(RequestState.Success(responseBuffer.toString()))
        }
    }
```

#### Voice TTS (Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview TTS)

**Endpoint**: `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts:streamGenerateContent`

**Request Payload**:
```json
{
  "contents": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "parts": [{"text": "Hello, how are you?"}]
    }
  ],
  "generationConfig": {
    "responseModalities": ["audio"],
    "temperature": 0.8,
    "speech_config": {
      "voice_config": {
        "prebuilt_voice_config": {
          "voice_name": "Zephyr"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

**Response Processing**:
```kotlin
// Parse streaming JSON array
val jsonArray = JSONArray(responseText)
for (idx in 0 until jsonArray.length()) {
    val json = jsonArray.getJSONObject(idx)
    val inlineData = json.getJSONObject("inlineData")
    val audioData = inlineData.getString("data") // Base64

    // Decode and play
    val audioBytes = Base64.decode(audioData, Base64.DEFAULT)
    audioQueue.offer(AudioChunk(audioBytes))
}
```

**Audio Configuration**:
- **Format**: PCM 16-bit mono
- **Sample Rate**: 24kHz
- **Playback**: AudioTrack con audio focus management
- **Streaming**: Real-time chunk processing
- **Latency**: ~500-1000ms (first chunk)

**Emotion Mapping**:
```kotlin
private val VOICE_MAP = mapOf(
    Emotion.HAPPY to "Zephyr",
    Emotion.EXCITED to "Zephyr",
    Emotion.THOUGHTFUL to "Zephyr",
    // ... temperatura variabile per emotion
)
```

#### Live Conversation (Gemini Live API)

**Protocol**: WebSocket (`wss://generativelanguage.googleapis.com`)

**Features**:
- Bidirectional audio streaming
- Real-time voice activity detection
- Adaptive barge-in (intelligent interruption)
- Optional camera feed
- Audio quality monitoring

**Components**:
```kotlin
@Singleton
class GeminiLiveWebSocketClient(private val auth: FirebaseAuth) {
    fun connect(apiKey: String)
    fun sendAudio(audioData: ByteArray)
    fun sendImage(imageData: ByteArray)
    fun disconnect()
}

@Singleton
class GeminiLiveAudioManager(
    context: Context,
    adaptiveBargeinDetector: AdaptiveBargeinDetector
) {
    fun startRecording()
    fun stopRecording()
    fun playAudio(audioData: ByteArray)
}

@Singleton
class AdaptiveBargeinDetector {
    fun detectInterruption(audioLevel: Float, context: ConversationContext)
}
```

### 2.5 Dependency Injection (Hilt 2.55)

**Modules Structure**:

```kotlin
// app/di/DatabaseModule.kt
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object DatabaseModule {
    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideDatabase(@ApplicationContext context: Context): AppDatabase

    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideNetworkConnectivityObserver(@ApplicationContext context: Context): NetworkConnectivityObserver
}

// data/mongo/di/FirestoreModule.kt
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object FirestoreModule {
    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideFirebaseAuth(): FirebaseAuth

    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideFirestore(): FirebaseFirestore {
        return FirebaseFirestore.getInstance(
            FirebaseApp.getInstance(),
            "calmify-native" // Secondary database
        )
    }
}

// data/mongo/di/MongoDataModule.kt
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object MongoDataModule {
    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideMongoRepository(
        firestore: FirebaseFirestore,
        auth: FirebaseAuth
    ): MongoRepository = FirestoreDiaryRepository(firestore, auth)

    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideChatRepository(
        chatSessionDao: ChatSessionDao,
        chatMessageDao: ChatMessageDao,
        auth: FirebaseAuth,
        diaryRepository: MongoRepository
    ): ChatRepository = ChatRepositoryImpl(...)
}

// features/chat/di/GeminiLiveModule.kt
@Module
@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
object GeminiLiveModule {
    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideGeminiLiveWebSocketClient(auth: FirebaseAuth): GeminiLiveWebSocketClient

    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideAdaptiveBargeinDetector(): AdaptiveBargeinDetector

    @Provides @Singleton
    fun provideGeminiLiveAudioManager(
        @ApplicationContext context: Context,
        bargeinDetector: AdaptiveBargeinDetector
    ): GeminiLiveAudioManager
}
```

**Injection Points**:
```kotlin
@AndroidEntryPoint
class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    @Inject lateinit var imageToUploadDao: ImageToUploadDao
    @Inject lateinit var apiConfigManager: ApiConfigManager
    @Inject lateinit var geminiNativeVoiceSystem: GeminiNativeVoiceSystem
}

@HiltViewModel
class ChatViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val chatRepository: ChatRepository,
    savedStateHandle: SavedStateHandle
) : ViewModel()
```

### 2.6 Security & API Key Management

**ApiConfigManager** con EncryptedSharedPreferences:

```kotlin
@Singleton
class ApiConfigManager @Inject constructor(
    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
) {
    private val masterKey = MasterKey.Builder(context)
        .setKeyScheme(MasterKey.KeyScheme.AES256_GCM)
        .build()

    private val encryptedPrefs = EncryptedSharedPreferences.create(
        context,
        "api_config_prefs",
        masterKey,
        EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefKeyEncryptionScheme.AES256_SIV,
        EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefValueEncryptionScheme.AES256_GCM
    )

    fun getGeminiApiKey(): String
    fun setGeminiApiKey(apiKey: String)
}
```

**BuildConfig Injection** (features/chat/build.gradle):
```groovy
defaultConfig {
    buildConfigField("String", "GEMINI_API_KEY", "\"${getGeminiApiKey()}\"")
    buildConfigField("String", "KEY_OPENAI_API", "\"${getOpenAIApiKey()}\"")
}

def getGeminiApiKey() {
    def localProperties = new Properties()
    def localPropertiesFile = rootProject.file('local.properties')
    if (localPropertiesFile.exists()) {
        localProperties.load(new FileInputStream(localPropertiesFile))
    }
    return localProperties.getProperty('GEMINI_API_KEY', '')
}
```

**Initialization Flow** (MainActivity):
```kotlin
override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)

    // Load API keys from BuildConfig via reflection
    val chatBuildConfig = Class.forName("com.lifo.chat.BuildConfig")
    val geminiApiKey = chatBuildConfig.getDeclaredField("GEMINI_API_KEY").get(null) as String

    // Store securely
    apiConfigManager.setGeminiApiKey(geminiApiKey)

    // Initialize voice system
    lifecycleScope.launch {
        geminiNativeVoiceSystem.initialize(geminiApiKey)
    }
}
```

## 3. Feature Modules Deep Dive

### 3.1 Features/Home - Unified Feed

**Responsibilities**:
- Display merged feed (diary entries + chat sessions)
- Search and filtering
- Navigation hub
- Drawer integration

**Key Components**:

```kotlin
@HiltViewModel
class HomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val unifiedContentRepository: UnifiedContentRepository,
    private val diaryRepository: MongoRepository
) : ViewModel() {

    private val _homeState = MutableStateFlow(HomeState())
    val homeState = _homeState.asStateFlow()

    init {
        loadUnifiedContent()
    }

    private fun loadUnifiedContent() {
        viewModelScope.launch {
            unifiedContentRepository.getUnifiedContent()
                .collect { result ->
                    when (result) {
                        is RequestState.Success -> {
                            _homeState.update { it.copy(
                                items = result.data,
                                isLoading = false
                            )}
                        }
                        is RequestState.Error -> {
                            _homeState.update { it.copy(
                                error = result.error.message,
                                isLoading = false
                            )}
                        }
                    }
                }
        }
    }
}
```

**Unified Content Model**:
```kotlin
sealed class HomeContentItem {
    data class DiaryItem(
        val id: String,
        val title: String,
        val description: String,
        val mood: String,
        val date: Instant,
        val images: List<String>
    ) : HomeContentItem()

    data class ChatItem(
        val id: String,
        val title: String,
        val lastMessage: String,
        val messageCount: Int,
        val lastMessageAt: Instant
    ) : HomeContentItem()
}
```

**UI Features**:
- **Filter Chips**: "Tutti", "Diario", "Chat"
- **Search Bar**: Full-text search con debouncing
- **Swipe Actions**: Delete, Edit (Material3 SwipeToDismiss)
- **FAB**: Multi-action (New Diary, New Chat, Live Chat)
- **Scroll Behavior**: BottomAppBar con `exitAlwaysScrollBehavior`

### 3.2 Features/Write - Diary Editor

**State Management**:
```kotlin
data class WriteState(
    val diary: Diary = Diary(),
    val selectedMood: Mood = Mood.Neutral,
    val selectedImages: List<Uri> = emptyList(),
    val isLoading: Boolean = false,
    val isSaving: Boolean = false,
    val error: String? = null
)
```

**Image Upload Flow**:
```kotlin
suspend fun uploadImages(images: List<Uri>): List<String> {
    return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
        images.mapIndexed { index, uri ->
            val imagePath = "images/${userId}/${diaryId}/image_$index.jpg"
            val uploadTask = storageRef.child(imagePath).putFile(uri)

            // Handle upload failure
            uploadTask.addOnFailureListener { exception ->
                imageToUploadDao.insertImage(ImageToUpload(
                    remoteImagePath = imagePath,
                    imageUri = uri.toString(),
                    sessionUri = uploadTask.snapshot.uploadSessionUri.toString()
                ))
            }

            imagePath
        }
    }
}
```

**Auto-save Draft**:
```kotlin
LaunchedEffect(diary) {
    snapshotFlow { diary }
        .debounce(2000)
        .collect { currentDiary ->
            saveDraft(currentDiary)
        }
}
```

### 3.3 Features/Chat - AI Chat System

**Chat State Management**:
```kotlin
data class ChatUiState(
    val currentSession: ChatSession? = null,
    val messages: List<ChatMessage> = emptyList(),
    val isLoading: Boolean = false,
    val isAiTyping: Boolean = false,
    val error: String? = null
)

data class ChatMessage(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val sessionId: String,
    val content: String,
    val isUser: Boolean,
    val timestamp: Instant = Instant.now(),
    val status: MessageStatus = MessageStatus.SENDING,
    val error: String? = null
)

enum class MessageStatus {
    SENDING, SENT, ERROR
}
```

**AI Response Generation Flow**:
```kotlin
fun sendMessage(content: String) {
    viewModelScope.launch {
        // 1. Save user message
        val userMessage = chatRepository.sendMessage(sessionId, content)

        // 2. Generate AI response with streaming
        chatRepository.generateAiResponse(
            sessionId = sessionId,
            userMessage = content,
            context = messages.takeLast(5)
        ).collect { result ->
            when (result) {
                is RequestState.Success -> {
                    _uiState.update { it.copy(
                        aiStreamingContent = result.data,
                        isAiTyping = true
                    )}
                }
                is RequestState.Error -> {
                    _uiState.update { it.copy(
                        error = result.error.message,
                        isAiTyping = false
                    )}
                }
            }
        }

        // 3. Save complete AI response
        chatRepository.saveAiMessage(sessionId, aiStreamingContent)
    }
}
```

**Diary Context Integration**:
```kotlin
private suspend fun getDiaryContext(): List<Diary> {
    val diariesResult = diaryRepository.getAllDiaries().first()

    return when (diariesResult) {
        is RequestState.Success -> {
            val cutoffDate = Instant.now().minus(30, ChronoUnit.DAYS)
            diariesResult.data
                .flatMap { it.value }
                .filter { it.date.toInstant().isAfter(cutoffDate) }
                .sortedByDescending { it.date.toInstant() }
                .take(5)
        }
        else -> emptyList()
    }
}
```

**Export to Diary**:
```kotlin
suspend fun exportSessionToDiary(sessionId: String): RequestState<String> {
    val session = chatSessionDao.getSession(sessionId).first()
    val messages = chatMessageDao.getMessagesForSession(sessionId).first()

    val diaryContent = """
        # ${session.title}
        *Conversazione con Lifo esportata il ${Instant.now().format()}*

        ## Punti chiave:
        ${extractKeyInsights(messages).joinToString("\n") { "- $it" }}

        ---

        ${messages.joinToString("\n\n") { message ->
            val role = if (message.isUser) "**Tu**" else "**Lifo**"
            "$role: ${message.content}"
        }}
    """.trimIndent()

    return RequestState.Success(diaryContent)
}
```

### 3.4 Features/Chat - Live Conversation

**Live Chat State**:
```kotlin
data class LiveChatState(
    val isConnected: Boolean = false,
    val isListening: Boolean = false,
    val isSpeaking: Boolean = false,
    val transcript: String = "",
    val audioLevel: Float = 0f,
    val error: String? = null,
    val sessionId: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
)
```

**WebSocket Management**:
```kotlin
class GeminiLiveWebSocketClient(private val auth: FirebaseAuth) {
    private var webSocket: WebSocket? = null

    fun connect(apiKey: String) {
        val url = "wss://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/ws/google.ai.generativelanguage.v1alpha.GenerativeService.BidiGenerateContent?key=$apiKey"

        val request = Request.Builder()
            .url(url)
            .build()

        webSocket = OkHttpClient().newWebSocket(request, object : WebSocketListener() {
            override fun onMessage(webSocket: WebSocket, text: String) {
                handleServerMessage(text)
            }

            override fun onFailure(webSocket: WebSocket, t: Throwable, response: Response?) {
                _connectionState.value = ConnectionState.Error(t.message)
            }
        })
    }

    fun sendAudio(audioData: ByteArray) {
        val message = JSONObject().apply {
            put("realtimeInput", JSONObject().apply {
                put("mediaChunks", JSONArray().apply {
                    put(JSONObject().apply {
                        put("mimeType", "audio/pcm")
                        put("data", Base64.encodeToString(audioData, Base64.NO_WRAP))
                    })
                })
            })
        }

        webSocket?.send(message.toString())
    }
}
```

**Audio Pipeline**:
```kotlin
class GeminiLiveAudioManager(
    context: Context,
    private val bargeinDetector: AdaptiveBargeinDetector
) {
    private var audioRecord: AudioRecord? = null
    private var audioTrack: AudioTrack? = null

    fun startRecording(onAudioData: (ByteArray) -> Unit) {
        val bufferSize = AudioRecord.getMinBufferSize(
            16000, // 16kHz sample rate
            AudioFormat.CHANNEL_IN_MONO,
            AudioFormat.ENCODING_PCM_16BIT
        )

        audioRecord = AudioRecord(
            MediaRecorder.AudioSource.VOICE_COMMUNICATION,
            16000,
            AudioFormat.CHANNEL_IN_MONO,
            AudioFormat.ENCODING_PCM_16BIT,
            bufferSize
        )

        audioRecord?.startRecording()

        // Read loop
        val audioBuffer = ByteArray(bufferSize)
        while (isRecording) {
            val bytesRead = audioRecord?.read(audioBuffer, 0, bufferSize) ?: 0
            if (bytesRead > 0) {
                onAudioData(audioBuffer.copyOf(bytesRead))
            }
        }
    }

    fun playAudio(audioData: ByteArray) {
        audioTrack?.write(audioData, 0, audioData.size)
    }
}
```

**Adaptive Barge-in Detection**:
```kotlin
class AdaptiveBargeinDetector {
    private var baselineNoiseLevel: Float = 0f
    private val voiceThresholdMultiplier = 1.5f

    fun detectInterruption(
        audioLevel: Float,
        conversationContext: ConversationContext
    ): BargeinDecision {
        // Calcola threshold adattivo basato su context
        val threshold = when (conversationContext.phase) {
            ConversationPhase.LISTENING -> baselineNoiseLevel * voiceThresholdMultiplier
            ConversationPhase.THINKING -> baselineNoiseLevel * voiceThresholdMultiplier * 1.2f
            ConversationPhase.SPEAKING -> baselineNoiseLevel * voiceThresholdMultiplier * 1.5f
        }

        return if (audioLevel > threshold) {
            BargeinDecision.INTERRUPT
        } else {
            BargeinDecision.CONTINUE
        }
    }
}
```

---

## 4. Data Flow & State Management

### 4.1 RequestState Pattern

**Definition**:
```kotlin
sealed class RequestState<out T> {
    object Idle : RequestState<Nothing>()
    object Loading : RequestState<Nothing>()
    data class Success<T>(val data: T) : RequestState<T>()
    data class Error(val error: Throwable) : RequestState<Nothing>()
}
```

**Usage in Repository**:
```kotlin
override fun getAllDiaries(): Flow<RequestState<Map<LocalDate, List<Diary>>>> = callbackFlow {
    trySend(RequestState.Loading)

    val listenerRegistration = firestore
        .collection("diaries")
        .whereEqualTo("ownerId", currentUserId)
        .addSnapshotListener { snapshot, error ->
            if (error != null) {
                trySend(RequestState.Error(error))
                return@addSnapshotListener
            }

            if (snapshot != null) {
                val diaries = snapshot.toObjects(Diary::class.java)
                val grouped = diaries.groupBy { it.date.toLocalDate() }
                trySend(RequestState.Success(grouped))
            }
        }

    awaitClose { listenerRegistration.remove() }
}
```

**Usage in ViewModel**:
```kotlin
init {
    viewModelScope.launch {
        diaryRepository.getAllDiaries()
            .collect { result ->
                _uiState.update {
                    when (result) {
                        RequestState.Idle -> it.copy(isLoading = false)
                        RequestState.Loading -> it.copy(isLoading = true)
                        is RequestState.Success -> it.copy(
                            diaries = result.data,
                            isLoading = false,
                            error = null
                        )
                        is RequestState.Error -> it.copy(
                            error = result.error.message,
                            isLoading = false
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
    }
}
```

**Usage in UI**:
```kotlin
val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()

when {
    uiState.isLoading -> LoadingIndicator()
    uiState.error != null -> ErrorMessage(uiState.error)
    uiState.diaries.isEmpty() -> EmptyState()
    else -> DiaryList(uiState.diaries)
}
```

### 4.2 Reactive Data Flow

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Firestore / Room                        │
│              (Single Source of Truth)                      │
└──────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
               │
               │ Real-time updates (Flow)
               │
┌──────────────▼─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Repository Layer                        │
│         (Transforms to RequestState<T>)                    │
└──────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
               │
               │ Flow<RequestState<T>>
               │
┌──────────────▼─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    ViewModel Layer                         │
│         (StateFlow<UiState>)                               │
└──────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
               │
               │ collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
               │
┌──────────────▼─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Compose UI Layer                        │
│         (Automatic recomposition)                          │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Benefits**:
- **Single Source of Truth**: Data flows in one direction
- **Reactive**: UI automatically updates when data changes
- **Lifecycle-Aware**: `collectAsStateWithLifecycle()` handles lifecycle
- **Type-Safe**: Compile-time checks for data types
- **Testable**: Easy to mock Repository and test ViewModel

---

## 5. Build System & Configuration

### 5.1 Gradle Version Catalog (libs.versions.toml)

**Key Versions**:
```toml
[versions]
agp = "8.13.0"
kotlin = "2.1.0"
ksp = "2.1.0-1.0.29"
compose-bom = "2025.01.00"
firebase-bom = "34.4.0"
room = "2.7.2"
dagger-hilt = "2.55"
coil = "3.3.0"
```

**Benefits**:
- Centralized version management
- Easy updates (change once, apply everywhere)
- Prevents version conflicts
- Supports version catalogs in `dependabot`

### 5.2 BuildSrc Pattern

**ProjectConfig.kt**:
```kotlin
object ProjectConfig {
    const val compileSdk = 35
    const val minSdk = 26
    const val targetSdk = 35
    const val javaVersion = "17"
    const val jvmTarget = "17"
    const val applicationId = "com.lifo.calmifyapp"
    const val versionCode = 1
    const val versionName = "1.0.0"
}
```

**Usage in build.gradle**:
```groovy
android {
    compileSdk ProjectConfig.compileSdk

    defaultConfig {
        applicationId ProjectConfig.applicationId
        minSdk ProjectConfig.minSdk
        targetSdk ProjectConfig.targetSdk
        versionCode ProjectConfig.versionCode
        versionName ProjectConfig.versionName
    }
}
```

### 5.3 ProGuard Configuration (Release)

**app/build.gradle**:
```groovy
buildTypes {
    release {
        minifyEnabled true
        shrinkResources true
        proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile('proguard-android-optimize.txt'), 'proguard-rules.pro'

        // APK splitting by ABI
        splits {
            abi {
                enable true
                reset()
                include 'armeabi-v7a', 'arm64-v8a', 'x86_64'
                universalApk false
            }
        }
    }
}
```

**Optimizations**:
- Code shrinking (removes unused code)
- Resource shrinking (removes unused resources)
- Obfuscation (renames classes/methods)
- Optimization (bytecode optimization)
- APK splitting (smaller downloads)

**Size Reduction**:
- Debug APK: ~50MB
- Release APK (arm64-v8a): ~15MB

---

## 6. Testing Strategy

### 6.1 Unit Testing

**ViewModels**:
```kotlin
@OptIn(ExperimentalCoroutinesApi::class)
class ChatViewModelTest {
    @get:Rule
    val instantTaskExecutorRule = InstantTaskExecutorRule()

    private val testDispatcher = StandardTestDispatcher()

    @Before
    fun setup() {
        Dispatchers.setMain(testDispatcher)
    }

    @Test
    fun `sendMessage updates UI state correctly`() = runTest {
        // Given
        val repository = mockk<ChatRepository>()
        val viewModel = ChatViewModel(repository)

        coEvery { repository.sendMessage(any(), any()) } returns RequestState.Success(mockMessage)

        // When
        viewModel.sendMessage("Hello")
        testDispatcher.scheduler.advanceUntilIdle()

        // Then
        viewModel.uiState.test {
            val state = awaitItem()
            assertEquals(1, state.messages.size)
            assertEquals("Hello", state.messages.first().content)
        }
    }
}
```

**Repositories**:
```kotlin
class FirestoreDiaryRepositoryTest {
    @get:Rule
    val instantTaskExecutorRule = InstantTaskExecutorRule()

    private lateinit var firestore: FirebaseFirestore
    private lateinit var auth: FirebaseAuth
    private lateinit var repository: FirestoreDiaryRepository

    @Before
    fun setup() {
        firestore = mockk()
        auth = mockk()
        repository = FirestoreDiaryRepository(firestore, auth)
    }

    @Test
    fun `getAllDiaries returns success with data`() = runTest {
        // Given
        val mockSnapshot = mockk<QuerySnapshot>()
        every { mockSnapshot.toObjects(Diary::class.java) } returns listOf(mockDiary)

        // When
        val result = repository.getAllDiaries().first()

        // Then
        assertTrue(result is RequestState.Success)
        assertEquals(1, (result as RequestState.Success).data.size)
    }
}
```

### 6.2 UI Testing (Compose)

```kotlin
@RunWith(AndroidJUnit4::class)
class ChatScreenTest {
    @get:Rule
    val composeTestRule = createComposeRule()

    @Test
    fun sendMessage_updatesMessageList() {
        // Given
        val viewModel = ChatViewModel(mockRepository)

        composeTestRule.setContent {
            ChatScreen(viewModel = viewModel)
        }

        // When
        composeTestRule.onNodeWithTag("message_input")
            .performTextInput("Hello")
        composeTestRule.onNodeWithTag("send_button")
            .performClick()

        // Then
        composeTestRule.onNodeWithText("Hello")
            .assertExists()
            .assertIsDisplayed()
    }
}
```

### 6.3 Integration Testing

**Database Migrations**:
```kotlin
@RunWith(AndroidJUnit4::class)
class MigrationTest {
    @get:Rule
    val helper = MigrationTestHelper(
        InstrumentationRegistry.getInstrumentation(),
        AppDatabase::class.java
    )

    @Test
    fun migrate3To4_containsCorrectData() {
        // Create database with version 3
        var db = helper.createDatabase(TEST_DB, 3)
        db.execSQL("INSERT INTO chat_sessions VALUES (...)")
        db.close()

        // Migrate to version 4
        db = helper.runMigrationsAndValidate(TEST_DB, 4, true)

        // Verify data
        val cursor = db.query("SELECT * FROM chat_sessions")
        assertTrue(cursor.count > 0)
    }
}
```

---

## 7. Performance Optimizations

### 7.1 Compose Performance

**Stable Keys for LazyColumn**:
```kotlin
LazyColumn {
    items(
        items = diaries,
        key = { diary -> diary.id } // Stable key
    ) { diary ->
        DiaryCard(diary = diary)
    }
}
```

**Remember Expensive Calculations**:
```kotlin
val sortedDiaries = remember(diaries, sortOrder) {
    diaries.sortedWith(compareByDescending { it.date })
}
```

**Avoid Recomposition**:
```kotlin
@Composable
fun DiaryCard(diary: Diary) {
    // Wrap in key() to prevent unnecessary recomposition
    key(diary.id) {
        Card {
            Text(diary.title)
        }
    }
}
```

**derivedStateOf for Computed State**:
```kotlin
val hasUnreadMessages = remember {
    derivedStateOf {
        messages.any { !it.isRead }
    }
}.value
```

### 7.2 Image Loading (Coil)

```kotlin
AsyncImage(
    model = ImageRequest.Builder(LocalContext.current)
        .data(imageUrl)
        .crossfade(true)
        .memoryCachePolicy(CachePolicy.ENABLED)
        .diskCachePolicy(CachePolicy.ENABLED)
        .build(),
    contentDescription = null
)
```

**Benefits**:
- Memory cache (faster subsequent loads)
- Disk cache (offline access)
- Crossfade animation (smooth transitions)
- Automatic image sizing

### 7.3 Database Performance

**Indexed Queries**:
```kotlin
@Entity(
    tableName = "chat_messages",
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["sessionId"]),
        Index(value = ["timestamp"])
    ]
)
data class ChatMessageEntity(...)
```

**Pagination**:
```kotlin
@Query("SELECT * FROM chat_sessions ORDER BY lastMessageAt DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset")
suspend fun getSessionsPaged(limit: Int, offset: Int): List<ChatSessionEntity>
```

**Room Paging 3**:
```kotlin
@Query("SELECT * FROM diaries ORDER BY date DESC")
fun getDiariesPaged(): PagingSource<Int, Diary>

// In ViewModel
val diariesFlow = Pager(
    config = PagingConfig(pageSize = 20),
    pagingSourceFactory = { dao.getDiariesPaged() }
).flow.cachedIn(viewModelScope)
```

---

## 8. Migration Notes (MongoDB Realm → Firebase Firestore)

### 8.1 Motivazioni della Migrazione

**Problemi con MongoDB Realm**:
- Complessità di setup e mantenimento
- Sync configuration complessa
- Performance issues con offline-first
- Limited free tier
- Dependency conflicts (Kotlin versions)

**Vantaggi di Firestore**:
- Seamless Firebase integration
- Offline-first nativo
- Simplified sync (automatic)
- Generous free tier
- Better Android SDK support
- Firestore Native Mode (scalable)

### 8.2 Cambiamenti nel Codice

**Before (Realm)**:
```kotlin
class Diary : RealmObject {
    @PrimaryKey
    var _id: ObjectId = ObjectId()
    var ownerId: String = ""
    var title: String = ""
    var description: String = ""
    var date: RealmInstant = RealmInstant.now()
}

// Repository
class MongoRepositoryImpl : MongoRepository {
    override fun getAllDiaries(): Flow<RequestState<Map<LocalDate, List<Diary>>>> {
        return realm.query<Diary>()
            .asFlow()
            .map { results ->
                RequestState.Success(results.list.groupBy { it.date.toLocalDate() })
            }
    }
}
```

**After (Firestore)**:
```kotlin
data class Diary(
    @DocumentId
    var _id: String = "",
    var ownerId: String = "",
    var title: String = "",
    var description: String = "",
    @ServerTimestamp
    var date: Date = Date.from(Instant.now())
) {
    constructor() : this("", "", "", "", Date.from(Instant.now()))
}

// Repository
class FirestoreDiaryRepository @Inject constructor(
    private val firestore: FirebaseFirestore,
    private val auth: FirebaseAuth
) : MongoRepository {
    override fun getAllDiaries(): Flow<RequestState<Map<LocalDate, List<Diary>>>> = callbackFlow {
        val listenerRegistration = firestore
            .collection("diaries")
            .whereEqualTo("ownerId", currentUserId)
            .addSnapshotListener { snapshot, error ->
                if (error != null) {
                    trySend(RequestState.Error(error))
                    return@addSnapshotListener
                }

                val diaries = snapshot?.toObjects(Diary::class.java) ?: emptyList()
                val grouped = diaries.groupBy { it.date.toLocalDate() }
                trySend(RequestState.Success(grouped))
            }

        awaitClose { listenerRegistration.remove() }
    }
}
```

**Build.gradle Changes**:
```groovy
// REMOVED
// id 'io.realm.kotlin'
// implementation libs.realm.sync

// ADDED
implementation libs.firebase.firestore
```

### 8.3 Data Migration Strategy

1. **Export from Realm**: Batch read all documents
2. **Transform**: Convert `RealmInstant` → `Date`, `ObjectId` → `String`
3. **Import to Firestore**: Batch write (500 docs per batch)
4. **Verify**: Check counts and sample data
5. **Switch**: Update app to use Firestore repository
6. **Deprecate**: Remove Realm dependencies

**Migration Script** (esempio):
```kotlin
suspend fun migrateRealmToFirestore() {
    val realmDiaries = realmRepository.getAllDiaries().first()
    val batch = firestore.batch()

    realmDiaries.forEachIndexed { index, diary ->
        val docRef = firestore.collection("diaries").document()
        val firestoreDiary = Diary(
            _id = docRef.id,
            ownerId = diary.ownerId,
            title = diary.title,
            description = diary.description,
            date = Date.from(diary.date.toInstant())
        )

        batch.set(docRef, firestoreDiary)

        // Commit batch every 500 documents
        if ((index + 1) % 500 == 0) {
            batch.commit().await()
            batch = firestore.batch()
        }
    }

    // Commit remaining
    batch.commit().await()
}
```

---

## 9. DevOps & CI/CD (Future Roadmap)

### 9.1 Recommended GitHub Actions Workflow

```yaml
name: Android CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '17'
        distribution: 'temurin'

    - name: Setup Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v2

    - name: Create local.properties
      run: |
        echo "GEMINI_API_KEY=${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}" >> local.properties
        echo "KEY_OPENAI_API=${{ secrets.KEY_OPENAI_API }}" >> local.properties

    - name: Grant execute permission for gradlew
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Run lint
      run: ./gradlew lint

    - name: Run unit tests
      run: ./gradlew test

    - name: Build debug APK
      run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

    - name: Upload APK
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: app-debug
        path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
```

### 9.2 Fastlane Setup (Google Play Deploy)

```ruby
# fastlane/Fastfile
default_platform(:android)

platform :android do
  desc "Deploy to Google Play Internal Track"
  lane :deploy_internal do
    gradle(
      task: "clean assembleRelease",
      properties: {
        "android.injected.signing.store.file" => ENV["KEYSTORE_PATH"],
        "android.injected.signing.store.password" => ENV["KEYSTORE_PASSWORD"],
        "android.injected.signing.key.alias" => ENV["KEY_ALIAS"],
        "android.injected.signing.key.password" => ENV["KEY_PASSWORD"]
      }
    )

    upload_to_play_store(
      track: 'internal',
      aab: 'app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab'
    )
  end
end
```

---

## 10. Future Enhancements

### 10.1 Roadmap Q1 2025

1. **Offline Mode Improvements**
   - Better conflict resolution
   - Offline queue visibility
   - Retry UI for failed syncs

2. **Analytics Dashboard**
   - Mood trends visualization
   - Chat usage statistics
   - Export analytics to PDF

3. **Collaboration Features**
   - Shared diaries (family/therapist)
   - Comments and reactions
   - Real-time collaboration

4. **Advanced Voice**
   - Custom voice cloning
   - Multi-language support
   - Voice emotion detection

5. **AI Enhancements**
   - Mood prediction
   - Proactive suggestions
   - Sentiment analysis

### 10.2 Technical Debt

1. **Testing Coverage**
   - Current: ~40% unit test coverage
   - Target: 80% coverage
   - Add integration tests for critical flows

2. **Documentation**
   - Add KDoc comments to all public APIs
   - Create architecture diagrams (PlantUML)
   - API documentation with Dokka

3. **Performance**
   - Profile with Android Profiler
   - Optimize large list rendering
   - Reduce app startup time

4. **Accessibility**
   - Add content descriptions
   - Screen reader support
   - Keyboard navigation

---

## 11. Conclusioni & Best Practices Learned

### 11.1 Architecture Lessons

1. **Multi-Module is Worth It**: Separation of concerns, faster builds, better testability
2. **Clean Architecture Works**: Layer separation makes code maintainable and testable
3. **Hilt Simplifies DI**: Less boilerplate, compile-time safety
4. **Room + Firestore**: Best of both worlds (local performance + cloud sync)

### 11.2 Compose Lessons

1. **StateFlow > LiveData**: Better for Compose, more flexible
2. **collectAsStateWithLifecycle()**: Lifecycle-aware collection is essential
3. **Remember is Key**: Avoid unnecessary recomposition
4. **Stable Keys**: Critical for LazyColumn performance

### 11.3 Firebase Lessons

1. **BOM is Essential**: Prevents version conflicts
2. **Offline-First**: Firestore cache makes app feel instant
3. **Security Rules**: Test thoroughly, easy to get wrong
4. **Firestore Native Mode**: Scalable and performant

### 11.4 AI Integration Lessons

1. **Streaming is Better UX**: Users see response immediately
2. **Context is King**: Diary integration makes AI much more useful
3. **Keep It Simple**: 1-2 sentence responses work better than long explanations
4. **Voice Latency Matters**: <1s for first chunk is critical

---

```
├── CLAUDE.md                                   # AI assistant guide
├── REFERENCES.MD                               # File references
└── PROJECT_TECHNICAL_REPORT.md                 # This file
```

---

## Appendix B: Key Dependencies

### Complete Dependency List

```toml
[versions]
agp = "8.13.0"
kotlin = "2.1.0"
ksp = "2.1.0-1.0.29"
compose-bom = "2025.01.00"
firebase-bom = "34.4.0"
room = "2.7.2"
dagger-hilt = "2.55"
coil = "3.3.0"
okhttp = "4.12.0"
websocket = "1.5.3"
accompanist = "0.36.0"

[libraries]
# Compose (managed by BOM)
compose-bom = { module = "androidx.compose:compose-bom", version.ref = "compose-bom" }
compose-ui = { module = "androidx.compose.ui:ui" }
compose-material3 = { module = "androidx.compose.material3:material3" }
compose-material-icons-extended = { module = "androidx.compose.material:material-icons-extended" }

# Firebase (managed by BOM)
firebase-bom = { module = "com.google.firebase:firebase-bom", version.ref = "firebase-bom" }
firebase-auth = { module = "com.google.firebase:firebase-auth" }
firebase-firestore = { module = "com.google.firebase:firebase-firestore" }
firebase-storage = { module = "com.google.firebase:firebase-storage" }
firebase-ai = { module = "com.google.firebase:firebase-ai" }

# Room
room-runtime = { module = "androidx.room:room-runtime", version.ref = "room" }
room-ktx = { module = "androidx.room:room-ktx", version.ref = "room" }
room-compiler = { module = "androidx.room:room-compiler", version.ref = "room" }

# Hilt
hilt-android = { module = "com.google.dagger:hilt-android", version.ref = "dagger-hilt" }
hilt-compiler = { module = "com.google.dagger:hilt-compiler", version.ref = "dagger-hilt" }
hilt-navigation-compose = { module = "androidx.hilt:hilt-navigation-compose", version = "1.2.0" }

# Coil
coil = { module = "io.coil-kt.coil3:coil-compose", version.ref = "coil" }
coil-network-okhttp = { module = "io.coil-kt.coil3:coil-network-okhttp", version.ref = "coil" }

# Networking
okhttp = { module = "com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp", version.ref = "okhttp" }
java-websocket = { module = "org.java-websocket:Java-WebSocket", version.ref = "websocket" }

# UI Libraries
accompanist-permissions = { module = "com.google.accompanist:accompanist-permissions", version.ref = "accompanist" }
richtext-ui-material3 = { module = "com.halilibo.compose-richtext:richtext-ui-material3", version = "0.20.0" }
```

---

## Appendix C: API Endpoints

### Gemini API Endpoints

**Text Generation**:
```
POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.0-flash:streamGenerateContent?key={API_KEY}
```

**Voice TTS**:
```
POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts:streamGenerateContent?key={API_KEY}
```

**Live Conversation (WebSocket)**:
```
wss://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/ws/google.ai.generativelanguage.v1alpha.GenerativeService.BidiGenerateContent?key={API_KEY}
```

### Firebase Endpoints

**Firestore**:
- Automatic endpoint management via Firebase SDK
- Database: `calmify-native`
- Region: Auto (configured in Firebase Console)

**Firebase Storage**:
- Bucket: `{project-id}.appspot.com`
- Path structure: `images/{userId}/{sessionId}/{filename}`

---

*Project: Calmify v1.0.0*
*Stack: Kotlin 2.1, Compose BOM 2025.01, Firebase BOM 34.4*
